members.name: Greg Penner
members.title: Chairman
members.bio: Chairman of Walmart. Background in technology investment through Madrone Capital Partners. Focus on digital commerce strategy.

members.name: Doug McMillon
members.title: CEO
members.bio: Leading Walmart's digital transformation and technology investment strategy including AI and automation in supply chain.

members.name: Sarah Friar
members.title: Director
members.bio: CEO of Nextdoor. Former CFO of Square. Expertise in digital platforms, data analytics and fintech.

members.name: Cesar Conde
members.title: Director
members.bio: Chairman of NBCUniversal News Group. Experience in media technology and digital transformation.

members.name: Tim Flynn
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former Chairman of KPMG. Expertise in governance, risk management and compliance.

members.name: Randall Stephenson
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of AT&T. Deep expertise in telecommunications technology and digital infrastructure.

executives.name: Suresh Kumar
executives.title: Global CTO and Chief Digital Officer

strategy_text: Walmart is accelerating AI adoption across supply chain optimization, inventory management, and customer experience. AI and machine learning are embedded in our strategic priorities to drive efficiency and competitive advantage in retail.
